name: Pecan Spice Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Maple syrup; or other liquid
3/4 cup Flour, whole wheat; or kamut
1/2 cup Flour, unbleached white; or tapioca flour
3/4 cup Pecans; chopped up to 1 cup
1/2 cup Raisins; currants or chopped dates
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Mix the oil and sweeteners together well in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, pecans, raisins or dates, anise seeds, cinnamon, sea salt, and optional nutmeg, ginger, and ground cloves.
4. Slowly stir the dry ingredients into the liquid mixture until combined.
5. Drop 1-2 tablespoons of the dough onto lightly oiled cookie sheets, about 2"-3 inches apart.
6. Bake for 9-12 minutes, or until lightly browned but still soft.
7. Cool on wire racks. The cookies will become crisp as they cool.
MAKES 1- 1 1/2 DOZEN
